query: UPDATE legal_pages SET content = REPLACE(REPLACE(content, 'pdfup.io', 'cloud-pdf.net'), 'PDFUp', 'CloudPDF') WHERE slug IN ('privacy', 'cookies', 'legal', 'gdpr', 'refund');
